revision.comment: Adding [[Category:making categorization show up on newly imported categories and templates]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]

revision.text:
{{Commonscat}} {{Navseasoncats}}
[[Category:Uncategorized categories]][[Category:Military history of Japan]] [[Category:Uncategorized categories]][[Category:20th century in Japan|Military]] [[Category:Uncategorized categories]][[Category:20th-century military history by country|Japan]] [[Category:making categorization show up on newly imported categories and templates]] [[Category:1 revision imported]]

revision.comment: Removing from [[Category:1 revision imported]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]

revision.text:

revision.comment: Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]

revision.text: {{Commonscat}} {{Navseasoncats}} [[Category:Military history of Japan by century]] [[Category:20th century in Japan|Military]] [[Category:20th-century military history by country|Japan]] [[en:Category:20th-century military history of Japan]] [[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]]" to "[[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[category:confirmed enwiki categories]]"
revision.text: {{Commonscat}} {{Navseasoncats}} [[Category:Military history of Japan by century]] [[Category:20th century in Japan|Military]] [[Category:20th-century military history by country|Japan]] [[en:Category:20th-century military history of Japan]] [[en:Category:20th-century military history of Japan]][[category:confirmed enwiki categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]]

revision.comment: Bot: remove obsolete category Confirmed enwiki categories
revision.text: {{Commonscat}} {{Navseasoncats}} [[Category:Military history of Japan by century]] [[Category:20th century in Japan|Military]] [[Category:20th-century military history by country|Japan]] [[en:Category:20th-century military history of Japan]] [[en:Category:20th-century military history of Japan]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]]

revision.comment: Bot: tidy cats/IWs; add JA prose & tracking

{{Commonscat}} {{Navseasoncats}}

revision.comment: Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q30711810)
Bot: remove [[Category:categories missing wikidata]] (has wikidata link)

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
revision.text: <!--templates--> {{Commonscat}} {{Navseasoncats}} {{wikidata link|Q30711810}} <!--interwikis--> [[en:Category:20th-century military history of Japan]] <!--categories--> [[Category:20th century in Japan|Military]] [[Category:20th-century military history by country|Japan]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:Military history of Japan by century]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=20th-century_military_history_of_Japan here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> <!--templates--> {{Commonscat}} {{Navseasoncats}} {{wikidata link|Q30711810}} <!--interwikis--> [[en:Category:20th-century military history of Japan]] <!--categories--> [[Category:20th century in Japan|Military]] [[Category:20th-century military history by country|Japan]] [[Category:Military history of Japan by century]]
